summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Tasneem Monib marketing portfolio website. All 8 project thumbnails verified with correct images. Project detail pages tested for Overview, Key Contributions, Deliverables sections. Tools Used section verified on 7 projects (correctly absent on INK Collective). Media galleries and video players tested. Navigation functionality verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Thumbnails verified: Nike (glowing swoosh), Denmark (Danish flag), Sports Marketing (UH Football players), Springtime Pediatrics (doctor), Fifth Ward (library), REACH (historical B&W photo), INK Collective (stacked books), HEART Program (laptop/desk). Tools Used section renders correctly on 7 projects and is correctly absent on INK Collective (empty tools array). Deliverables section shows PDF links with ExternalLink icon and text items with CheckCircle2 icon. Sports Marketing has 7-image gallery and 3 native video players. Fifth Ward has YouTube embed.
tests_passed: All 8 project thumbnail images loading correctly on Work section grid
Nike project: glowing Nike swoosh image (NOT generic business meeting)
Denmark project: Danish flag image (NOT whiteboard meeting)
Sports Marketing project: real UH Football photo (players from behind)
Fifth Ward Documentary: library image loading
REACH Research: black & white historical photo (Antone's storefront)
INK Collective: stacked books image (NOT sports-related)
Each project detail page loads with Overview, Key Contributions, Deliverables & Work Samples sections
Tools Used section renders in sidebar on Nike, Denmark, Sports Marketing, Springtime Pediatrics, Fifth Ward, REACH, HEART Program
INK Collective project page does NOT show Tools Used section (empty tools array)
Deliverables section renders PDF links (with ExternalLink icon) and text-type items (with CheckCircle2 icon) on Nike project
Sports Marketing project shows 7-image photo gallery and 3 native video players
Fifth Ward project shows YouTube embedded video
All project card 'View Case Study' links navigate to correct project detail pages
Navigation works: About, Work, Contact links, Resume download button
